title: Odyssey G5 G50F 32 Inch 180Hz Qhd Ls32Fg502Euxen
features: Boost your game's realism with true-to-life visuals

Step into a game world that's more vibrant and immersive than ever before. With 1.7 times the pixel density of Full HD (1920x1080), QHD resolution (2560x1440) boasts incredibly detailed, pin-sharp images. Now you can take in the action in more detail on the same-sized screen.
Vivid colors across the whole screen

Enjoy realistic game scenes with Fast IPS panel. The 178¬∞ wide viewing angle accurately delivers clear, crisp hues that stay consistent from various viewpoints, while quick response time reduces motion blur and ghosting вАФ providing an engaging gaming experience.
Enjoy lifelike visuals with improved contrast and color accuracy. HDR10 provides brighter highlights and nuanced shadows for added depth вАФ making scenes feel more vivid and realistic.
Experience minimized lag for fast-paced action
Race to the top with ultimate speed with a 180Hz refresh rate and 1ms response time (GtG). Capture your moves in real-time with minimized lag and react fast with ultra-smooth gaming precision.
Immerse in smooth action without disruption
G-Sync compatibility syncs the GPU and panel to reduce choppiness, screen lag and image tearing. Along with AMD FreeSync, it creates ultra-smooth scenes, giving you a competitive edge in gaming.
Hit your marks with next-level accuracy
Gain precision in your shots with Virtual Aim Point. Crosshairs on the screen increase the accuracy of your aim when the action peaks.
Reach the height of winning in total comfort. Simply tilt and adjust your monitor until all enemies are in perfect view.
